name: Changelog Watcher
summary: Watches configured product changelog URLs and RSS feeds for new entries; outputs a digest.
description: Monitors changelog pages and feeds for a list of products or projects. When new entries appear, produces a digest with product name, version or date, and link. Useful for staying current with dependencies and tools.

inputs.description: Changelog URLs and optional since date

env.name: CHANGELOG_URLS
env.description: Comma-separated changelog page or feed URLs

env.name: SINCE_DAYS
env.description: Only include entries from last N days

safety.description: Only fetches configured changelog URLs; read-only.

steps: Set CHANGELOG_URLS and optional SINCE_DAYS, OUTPUT_PATH

execution.notes: Runtime fetches and parses; template is declarative only.
